accepted_path.why: tests whether task-level directions are stable before larger benchmark design

decision_rationale: Iter87 is valid pilot evidence, but mixed-direction task deltas and direction flips against iter86 make external benchmark design premature. One same-slice replication is the smallest useful next spend.

rejected_paths.why_rejected_now: mixed-direction single-pilot evidence with three task-direction flips is not stable enough for larger benchmark design
the metric is computable, non-saturated, and receipt/accounting evidence is clean
the signal is nonzero and diagnostically useful, even though it is not yet stable
